who: HR managers in small accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month
offer: For HR managers in small accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month, time tracking discrepancies cause payroll errors. We automate payroll reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation using spreadsheets.
problem: Inaccurate payroll processing due to time tracking discrepancies.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for HR managers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on payroll
DM outreach to HR managers with demo video
Share insights in community forums for HR managers
try_it: Let users try time tracking and discrepancy alerts on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
